name: Texas Caviar- Pickled Black-Eyed Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Wine (I like red wine but, white may be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the liquid from the peas.
2. Place the drained peas in a bowl.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the bowl and mix thoroughly.
4. Store the mixture in a jar.
5. Remove the garlic clove after 2-4 days of storage.
6. This recipe keeps for up to 15 days in the refrigerator.
7. Serves 6-8 as an appetizer and is good when scooped up with a saltine cracker!
